caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses, wearing a light green embroidered tunic and a dark beaded necklace, speaks against a plain dark background. She is positioned in the center of the frame, gesturing with her hands to emphasize her speech. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her garment. In the bottom corners of the frames, a gold logo featuring a stylized sun is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to talk, her facial expressions shifting slightly as she speaks, and her hand movements evolving from a closed gesture to a more open, expressive motion. The lighting remains consistent across the scenes, focusing on the subject while the surrounding environment remains dark and void of other objects or people.
